Metrics Captured: Throughput, latency, GPU utilization, memory usage, temperature, power draw, errors
Expected Behavior: GPU is utilized and workload completes repeatedly
Pass Criteria: Workload completes, GPU telemetry collected, no critical errors
Fail Criteria: Crash, GPU unavailable, driver error, repeated failure

Metrics Captured: Throughput, p50/p95/p99 latency, utilization, memory usage
Expected Behavior: Inference runs with stable latency and expected GPU access
Pass Criteria: Inference completes and metrics are recorded
Fail Criteria: Framework cannot access GPU or workload fails

Metrics Captured: Tokens/sec or requests/sec, latency, memory usage, power draw
Expected Behavior: Workload runs without unexpected memory or driver errors
Pass Criteria: Workload completes with telemetry and no critical error
Fail Criteria: OOM below expected size, driver error, crash

Metrics Captured: Memory usage, OOM point, recovery behavior, errors
Expected Behavior: Memory use increases predictably and OOM is handled cleanly
Pass Criteria: OOM behavior is documented and system recovers
Fail Criteria: System instability, GPU reset, unrecovered driver error

Expected Behavior: Multi-GPU communication runs on supported systems
Pass Criteria: NCCL test completes on approved multi-GPU target
Fail Criteria: NCCL failure, missing GPU, topology mismatch
Notes: Optional until multi-GPU hardware is available
